summary: An unrecognized --aspect-ratio must fail with a usage error naming the valid set, not silently fall back to 1:1.
reason: resolveAspect's default branch quietly returned 1:1 for any unknown label, so a typo like 5:4 produced a square image with no signal to the user. Validating at the single chokepoint (resolveAspect) surfaces the mistake; generate/batch/redo all route through it, and preset save validates up front so a bad ratio fails at save time rather than later at generation.
validated_outcome: preset save --aspect-ratio 5:4 exits 2 with the valid-set error; valid ratios still save. go build ./... and go vet ./... pass.
